features: This is the mr.ECO series sponge from Martini S.P.A. in Italy

Made of cellulose from natural plant fibers and sisal recycled PET fiber (hard). The cellulose sponge has excellent water absorption and is highly effective for removing dirt without detergents, making it durable, durable and long lasting

The sponge side is a sponge that can be cleaned gently without damaging delicate materials, such as lacquerware, ceramics, and glass. In addition to the kitchen, you can also use it to remove stains in your bathroom or vanity. The fiber side is suitable for scrubbing stubborn dirt
Made of biodegradable and recyclable materials so it is environmentally friendly
Size (H x W x Thickness): Approx. 3.9 x 2.8 x 0.8 inches (10 x 7
description: 2 x Dual action sponges in cellulose and strong fibre. The cellulose side of plant origin is super absorbent, ideal for gentle cleaning, while the fibre side cleans the most encrusted surfaces thoroughly. Multi-purpose, ideal for kitchen and bathroom. FSC cardboard packaging from responsibly managed forests. Made in Italy.
